titleStmt.title: SII 29.192: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 192. (A.R. No. B. 186 of 1962-63.) GUNDIMALLA, ALAMPUR TALUK, MAHABUBNAGAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: The top portion of the slab is broken and lost. As a result much of the information at the beginning is lost. The record registers the gift of Saṟiyūr together with the income from the taxes like manevaṇa and poledeṟe for the merit of Govindaradēva and Kētabbarasi for offerings, repairs, feeding of the ascetics and the students in the temple (name lost). The gift was made over to Kāḷēśvara paṇḍita of lākuḷa sect.
The record is dated in [Chalukya Vi]krama year 7, Dundubhi. It corresponds to [Śaka 1004] 1082 A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sida
gōvindara
yanagaṁ nṛpa
nāmādi samasta pra
krama dēḷaneya duṁdubhi
nti nimittamāgi śrīguṇṭi ma
dāra māṭakūṭa prasādakkaṁ tapō
dhana vidyārththigaḷa yūraṁ gōvindara dēvagaṁ kētabbara
sigaṁ dharmmamā svādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhāna
japasamādhi dyanēka śāstrapārāvāragaru mōkṣa lakṣmī
viḷāsinī kaṭākṣa capaḷēkṣaṇānaṁda hṛdayarkkāḷamukha samayūraviṁde
nīramāramaṇar lākuḷa siddhānta sarōvara jaḷakēḷi vinōdānanda bṛṁdārakarāja
haṁsar gaurīpati padāravinda makaranda parimaḷa svādānanda madhukarappa śrī vādī
bhava vajrāṁkuśa kaḷēśvara paṇḍita dēvargge dhārapūrvvakadiṁ sarvvanamasya māḍi koṭṭa dha
rmmamentendare . rājarasa debbarasa rācaladēvi candiyabbarasiyara manevaṇa pōle
deṟe sādavāpu kāṇikeyoḷagāgi samastavāda teṟeyellamaṁ sarvvanamasya
māgi saṟiyūraṁ biṭṭu . Ācandrārkkaṁbaraṁ koṭṭa sāsana . Idharmmamaṁ pūṇḍūra
rasugaḷārānumatikramisi koṇḍarappade kurukṣētradaluṁ pāyāgeya
luṁ vāraṇāsiyaluṁ śrīparbatadaluṁ sāsira kavileyumaṁ sāsirvvaru
brāhmaṇaru manekkōṭi tapōdhanarumanaḷida pātakakke sa
luvaru . © . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.192 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
